name: Lemon-Coconut Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Place butter or margarine in an 8 by 12 inch microwave-safe baking dish.
2. Microwave on High setting (100 percent power) for about 1 minute to melt the butter.
3. Stir in 1 cup flour, brown sugar, and 1/4 cup coconut into the melted butter. Press into the bottom of the dish.
4. Microwave on High for 2 minutes to set the crust.
5. Crack eggs into a medium-sized microwave-safe mixing bowl. Beat well, then beat in all remaining ingredients except powdered sugar, blending thoroughly.
6. Cover bowl loosely with wax paper and microwave for 3 to 4 minutes, or until the mixture bubbles and thickens, stirring every minute.
7. Pour the filling over the crust and spread evenly with a spatula. Microwave on High for 1 to 2 minutes longer, or until set.
8. Let stand on a heatproof surface until cool before cutting into bars.
9. Dust with powdered sugar.
Makes 2 dozen bars.
